# Table Creation for Posterior Draws

Create a table for unique values of posterior draws. This is usually
only useful when summarizing predictions of ordinal models.

## Usage

``` r
posterior_table(x, levels = NULL)
```

## Arguments

- x:

  A matrix of posterior draws where rows indicate draws and columns
  indicate parameters.

- levels:

  Optional values of possible posterior values. Defaults to all unique
  values in `x`.

## Value

A matrix where rows indicate parameters and columns indicate the unique
values of posterior draws.

## Examples

``` r
# \dontrun{
fit <- brm(rating ~ period + carry + treat,
           data = inhaler, family = cumulative())
#> Compiling Stan program...
#> Start sampling

posterior_table(pr)
```
